classification_rationale: Analysis-only launch packet for local_policy_scoring investigation of t_intersection_transfer hard slice. Follows #2801 stop decision for topology reselection and implements the recommended non-topology successor target.
hypothesis: Per-step local-policy scoring diagnostics will reveal whether 13 topology switches at 6.39m progress are caused by blocked_geometry (no viable alternative within scoring horizon) or switch_too_often (oscillation due to scoring noise or insufficient hysteresis).
comparator: topology_guided_hybrid_rule_v0 with progress_gated reselection at 0.05m threshold from #2751, which produced 6.39m progress with 13 switches and horizon_exhausted.
negative_control: simple_negative_control (empty_map_8_directions_east) reused from #2751; expect zero switches and stable best-candidate scoring.
stop_rule: Stop if: (1) in at least 80% of scoring steps, best-vs-second-best score gap is below 5% of the per-episode absolute score range while route progress remains below 6.5m (blocked_geometry), (2) rapid oscillation shows >10 switches in <20% of episode steps with no candidate maintaining best-score for at least five consecutive scoring steps (switch_too_often), or (3) instrumentation cannot be produced without non-trivial code changes (blocked).

decision_rule.switch_too_often: revise; hysteresis or stability fix recommended
decision_rule.clear_scoring_signal_selection_fails: revise; selection-mechanism fix recommended, could support future runtime packet
